title: crepis acuminata var. intermedia
intro: Crepis acuminata var. intermedia, also known as the Rocky Mountain Hawksbeard or Narrowleaf Hawksbeard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crepis acuminata var. intermedia include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
